ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Supplemental Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Supplemental Accounting
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf for Public Administrator. Giulio Accornero for Linda Lucy (Sole Heir).

Mr. Weinkauf stated that they are in the process of liquidating the savings bonds. Mr. Accornero stated that the savings bonds are in joint tenancy with the Decedent and the Mother, that he has authorization to receive distribution, that the check is only being mailed to him and that the check is payable to the Heir. Mr. Weinkauf asked that the request for preliminary distribution be granted, that the issue of the savings bonds be continued, stated that ten or so social security checks were found, that he does not know if the checks are of value or not, and that he will do a supplemental accounting on those items. Status on filing of a supplemental accounting of the above mentioned items was set for April 29, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The issue of preliminary distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
